description_long: This object is a stylized doll head with exaggerated, rounded features and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The head is predominantly a tan or light brown color, speckled with dark spots that give it a mottled, almost freckled appearance. The facial features are simplified, with shallow eye sockets, a small nose, and a subtle mouth, all blending smoothly into the surface. The ears are prominent and stick out from the sides of the head, while the back of the head is rounded and unadorned. The base of the neck appears slightly irregular, possibly indicating a broken or unfinished edge. There are no visible clothing details, hair, or accessories present on the head.
description: A tan, speckled doll head with rounded features, prominent ears, and a smooth, glossy surface. The face is simplified and lacks hair or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, with shallow eye sockets, a small nose, subtle mouth, and both ears visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding ear and the smooth, rounded contour of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, which is rounded and unadorned, with both ears visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right ear and the profile of the face, with the neck base visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object is a bare doll head with no garments or fabric details.
attribute_pose: Head is upright and forward-facing; no limbs or torso are present.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed mouth, shallow eye sockets, and no pronounced emotion.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and bald.
